content.text: Good, I've read all prior wave artifacts. Let me now read the remaining critical files and set up the deliver infrastructure.
Now let me read the DES/execute skill file and check for existing infrastructure.

content.content:
1→---
     2→name: nw-execute
     3→description: "Dispatches a single roadmap step to a specialized agent for TDD execution. Use when implementing a specific step from a roadmap.json plan."
     4→user-invocable: true
     5→argument-hint: '[agent] [feature-id] [step-id] - Example: @nw-software-crafter "auth-upgrade" "01-01"'
     6→---
     7→
     8→# NW-EXECUTE: Atomic Task Execution
     9→
    10→**Wave**: EXECUTION_WAVE | **Agent**: Dispatched agent (specified by caller)
    11→
    12→## Overview
    13→
    14→Dispatch a single roadmap step to an agent. Orchestrator extracts step context from roadmap so agent never loads the full roadmap.
    15→
    16→## Syntax
    17→
    18→```
    19→/nw-execute @{agent} "{feature-id}" "{step-id}"
    20→```
    21→
    22→## Context Files Required
    23→
    24→- `docs/feature/{feature-id}/deliver/roadmap.json` — Orchestrator reads once, extracts step context
    25→- `docs/feature/{feature-id}/deliver/execution-log.json` — Agent appends only (never reads)
    26→
    27→## Rigor Profile Integration
    28→
    29→Before dispatching the agent, read rigor config from `.nwave/des-config.json` (key: `rigor`). If absent, use standard defaults.
    30→
    31→- **`agent_model`**: Pass as `model` parameter to Agent tool. If `"inherit"`, omit `model` (inherits from session).
    32→- **`tdd_phases`**: If `["RED_UNIT", "GREEN"]` (lean), modify the TDD_PHASES section in the DES template to only include those 2 phases. Remove PREPARE/RED_ACCEPTANCE/COMMIT instructions.
    33→- **`refactor_pass`**: If `false`, skip COMMIT phase refactoring instructions.
    34→
    35→## Dispatcher Workflow
    36→
    37→1. Parse parameters: agent name|feature ID|step ID
    38→2. Read rigor profile from `.nwave/des-config.json` (default: standard)
    39→3. Validate roadmap and execution-log exist
    40→4. Grep roadmap for `step_id: "{step-id}"` with ~50 lines context
    41→5. Extract step fields and invoke Agent tool with DES template below, applying rigor model and phases
    42→
    43→## Agent Invocation
    44→
    45→@{agent}
    46→
    47→Use this DES template verbatim. Fill `{placeholders}` from roadmap. Without DES markers, hooks cannot validate.
    48→
    49→```
    50→<!-- DES-VALIDATION : required -->
    51→<!-- DES-PROJECT-ID : {feature-id} -->
    52→<!-- DES-STEP-ID : {step-id} -->
    53→
    54→# DES_METADATA
    55→Step: {step-id}
    56→Feature: {feature-id}
    57→Command: /nw-execute
    58→
    59→# AGENT_IDENTITY
    60→Agent: {agent-name}
    61→
    62→# SKILL_LOADING
    63→Before starting TDD phases, read your skill files for methodology guidance.
    64→Skills path: ~/.claude/skills/nw-{skill-name}/SKILL.md
    65→Always load at PREPARE: tdd-methodology.md, quality-framework.md
    66→Load on-demand per phase as specified in your Skill Loading Strategy table.
    67→
    68→# TASK_CONTEXT
    69→{step context from roadmap - name|description|acceptance_criteria|test_file|scenario_name|quality_gates|implementation_notes|dependencies|estimated_hours|deliverables|files_to_modify}
    70→
    71→# DESIGN_CONTEXT
    72→{Summary of architectural decisions relevant to this step, extracted by the orchestrator from design wave artifacts (architecture-design.md, component-boundaries.md, wave-decisions.md). Include: component structure, dependency boundaries, technology choices, and any design constraints that affect implementation. If no design artifacts exist, write "No design artifacts available — use project conventions."}
    73→
    74→# TDD_PHASES
    75→Execute in order:
    76→0. PREPARE - Load context, verify prerequisites
    77→1. RED_ACCEPTANCE - Activate or write acceptance test (PRIMARY TBU DEFENSE)
    78→   If TASK_CONTEXT includes test_file: locate it, remove @skip/@ignore/@pending/xit/.skip/[Ignore] marker
    79→   from the target scenario, run it — must fail for business logic reason (not import/syntax error).
    80→   If no test_file in TASK_CONTEXT: write a new failing acceptance test from acceptance_criteria.
    81→   PORT-TO-PORT PRINCIPLE: The acceptance test exercises the scenario through
    82→   the driving port (application service, orchestrator, CLI handler, API controller),
    83→   not a decomposed helper or internal class. A correctly-written port-to-port test
    84→   makes TBU structurally impossible — if a new function were missing or unwired,
    85→   THIS test stays RED. That is the entire point: GREEN is unreachable without wiring.
    86→   Litmus test: "If I delete the call-site that wires the new code, does this test fail?"
    87→   If no → the test is at the wrong level. Fix it before proceeding.
    88→2. RED_UNIT - Write failing unit test (or integration test for adapter/infrastructure
    89→   code — adapters use real infrastructure, never mocked unit tests)
    90→3. GREEN - Minimal code to pass tests
    91→   After GREEN: run FULL test suite. If all pass, proceed to COMMIT immediately.
    92→   Smell test: if any new function is only called from test code, your acceptance
    93→   test is at the wrong abstraction level — go back to RED_ACCEPTANCE and fix it.
    94→   Never move to new task or stop without committing green code.
    95→4. COMMIT - Stage and commit with conventional message
    96→   Include git trailer: `Step-ID: {step-id}` (required for DES verification)
    97→   Example:
    98→   ```
    99→   feat(feature-id): implement feature X
   100→
   101→   Step-ID: 02-01
   102→   ```
   103→
   104→# QUALITY_GATES
   105→- All tests pass before COMMIT
   106→- No skipped phases without blocked_by reason
   107→- Coverage maintained or improved
   108→
   109→# OUTCOME_RECORDING
   110→After ACTUALLY EXECUTING each phase, record via DES CLI:
   111→
   112→    PYTHONPATH=$HOME/.claude/lib/python python3 -m des.cli.log_phase \
   113→      --project-dir docs/feature/{feature-id}/deliver \
   114→      --step-id {step-id} \
   115→      --phase {PHASE_NAME} \
   116→      --status EXECUTED \
   117→      --data PASS
   118→
   119→For SKIPPED phases (genuinely not applicable):
   120→
   121→    PYTHONPATH=$HOME/.claude/lib/python python3 -m des.cli.log_phase \
   122→      --project-dir docs/feature/{feature-id}/deliver \
   123→      --step-id {step-id} \
   124→      --phase {PHASE_NAME} \
   125→      --status SKIPPED \
   126→      --data "NOT_APPLICABLE: reason"
   127→
   128→CLI enforces real UTC timestamps and validates phase names.
   129→Do NOT manually edit execution-log.json.
   130→Use the DES CLI to record phase outcomes and create log files.
   131→Python resolution: `python3` — works on macOS (python3 only), Linux, and Windows.
   132→
   133→CRITICAL: Only the executing agent calls the CLI.
   134→Orchestrator MUST NEVER write phase entries — only the agent that performed the work. A log entry without actual execution is a **violation that DES detects and that will cause integrity verification to fail**, blocking finalize.
   135→
   136→# RECORDING_INTEGRITY
   137→Valid Skip Prefixes: NOT_APPLICABLE, BLOCKED_BY_DEPENDENCY, APPROVED_SKIP, CHECKPOINT_PENDING
   138→Anti-Fraud Rules:
   139→- NEVER write EXECUTED for phases you did not actually perform
   140→- NEVER invent timestamps — DES CLI generates real UTC timestamps
   141→- DES audits all entries; integrity violations block finalize
   142→
   143→# BOUNDARY_RULES
   144→- Only modify files listed in step's files_to_modify
   145→- Do not load roadmap.json
   146→- Do not modify execution-log.json structure (append only)
   147→- NEVER write execution-log entries for phases you did not execute
   148→
   149→# TIMEOUT_INSTRUCTION
   150→Target: 30 turns max. If approaching limit, COMMIT current progress.
   151→If GREEN complete (all tests pass), MUST commit before returning — even at turn limit.
   152→```
   153→
   154→**Configuration:**
   155→- subagent_type: extracted agent name
   156→- Turn limits are defined in each agent's `maxTurns` frontmatter field (not as a tool parameter)
   157→
   158→## Error Handling
   159→
   160→- Invalid agent: report available agents
   161→- Missing roadmap/execution-log: report path not found
   162→- Step not in roadmap: report available step IDs

file.content:
---
name: nw-execute
description: "Dispatches a single roadmap step to a specialized agent for TDD execution. Use when implementing a specific step from a roadmap.json plan."
user-invocable: true
argument-hint: '[agent] [feature-id] [step-id] - Example: @nw-software-crafter "auth-upgrade" "01-01"'
---

# NW-EXECUTE: Atomic Task Execution

**Wave**: EXECUTION_WAVE | **Agent**: Dispatched agent (specified by caller)

## Overview

Dispatch a single roadmap step to an agent. Orchestrator extracts step context from roadmap so agent never loads the full roadmap.

## Syntax

```
/nw-execute @{agent} "{feature-id}" "{step-id}"
```

## Context Files Required

- `docs/feature/{feature-id}/deliver/roadmap.json` — Orchestrator reads once, extracts step context
- `docs/feature/{feature-id}/deliver/execution-log.json` — Agent appends only (never reads)

## Rigor Profile Integration

Before dispatching the agent, read rigor config from `.nwave/des-config.json` (key: `rigor`). If absent, use standard defaults.

- **`agent_model`**: Pass as `model` parameter to Agent tool. If `"inherit"`, omit `model` (inherits from session).
- **`tdd_phases`**: If `["RED_UNIT", "GREEN"]` (lean), modify the TDD_PHASES section in the DES template to only include those 2 phases. Remove PREPARE/RED_ACCEPTANCE/COMMIT instructions.
- **`refactor_pass`**: If `false`, skip COMMIT phase refactoring instructions.

## Dispatcher Workflow

1. Parse parameters: agent name|feature ID|step ID
2. Read rigor profile from `.nwave/des-config.json` (default: standard)
3. Validate roadmap and execution-log exist
4. Grep roadmap for `step_id: "{step-id}"` with ~50 lines context
5. Extract step fields and invoke Agent tool with DES template below, applying rigor model and phases

## Agent Invocation

@{agent}

Use this DES template verbatim. Fill `{placeholders}` from roadmap. Without DES markers, hooks cannot validate.

```
<!-- DES-VALIDATION : required -->
<!-- DES-PROJECT-ID : {feature-id} -->
<!-- DES-STEP-ID : {step-id} -->

# DES_METADATA
Step: {step-id}
Feature: {feature-id}
Command: /nw-execute

# AGENT_IDENTITY
Agent: {agent-name}

# SKILL_LOADING
Before starting TDD phases, read your skill files for methodology guidance.
Skills path: ~/.claude/skills/nw-{skill-name}/SKILL.md
Always load at PREPARE: tdd-methodology.md, quality-framework.md
Load on-demand per phase as specified in your Skill Loading Strategy table.

# TASK_CONTEXT
{step context from roadmap - name|description|acceptance_criteria|test_file|scenario_name|quality_gates|implementation_notes|dependencies|estimated_hours|deliverables|files_to_modify}

# DESIGN_CONTEXT
{Summary of architectural decisions relevant to this step, extracted by the orchestrator from design wave artifacts (architecture-design.md, component-boundaries.md, wave-decisions.md). Include: component structure, dependency boundaries, technology choices, and any design constraints that affect implementation. If no design artifacts exist, write "No design artifacts available — use project conventions."}

# TDD_PHASES
Execute in order:
0. PREPARE - Load context, verify prerequisites
1. RED_ACCEPTANCE - Activate or write acceptance test (PRIMARY TBU DEFENSE)
   If TASK_CONTEXT includes test_file: locate it, remove @skip/@ignore/@pending/xit/.skip/[Ignore] marker
   from the target scenario, run it — must fail for business logic reason (not import/syntax error).
   If no test_file in TASK_CONTEXT: write a new failing acceptance test from acceptance_criteria.
   PORT-TO-PORT PRINCIPLE: The acceptance test exercises the scenario through
   the driving port (application service, orchestrator, CLI handler, API controller),
   not a decomposed helper or internal class. A correctly-written port-to-port test
   makes TBU structurally impossible — if a new function were missing or unwired,
   THIS test stays RED. That is the entire point: GREEN is unreachable without wiring.
   Litmus test: "If I delete the call-site that wires the new code, does this test fail?"
   If no → the test is at the wrong level. Fix it before proceeding.
2. RED_UNIT - Write failing unit test (or integration test for adapter/infrastructure
   code — adapters use real infrastructure, never mocked unit tests)
3. GREEN - Minimal code to pass tests
   After GREEN: run FULL test suite. If all pass, proceed to COMMIT immediately.
   Smell test: if any new function is only called from test code, your acceptance
   test is at the wrong abstraction level — go back to RED_ACCEPTANCE and fix it.
   Never move to new task or stop without committing green code.
4. COMMIT - Stage and commit with conventional message
   Include git trailer: `Step-ID: {step-id}` (required for DES verification)
   Example:
   ```
   feat(feature-id): implement feature X

   Step-ID: 02-01
   ```

# QUALITY_GATES
- All tests pass before COMMIT
- No skipped phases without blocked_by reason
- Coverage maintained or improved

# OUTCOME_RECORDING
After ACTUALLY EXECUTING each phase, record via DES CLI:

    PYTHONPATH=$HOME/.claude/lib/python python3 -m des.cli.log_phase \
      --project-dir docs/feature/{feature-id}/deliver \
      --step-id {step-id} \
      --phase {PHASE_NAME} \
      --status EXECUTED \
      --data PASS

For SKIPPED phases (genuinely not applicable):

    PYTHONPATH=$HOME/.claude/lib/python python3 -m des.cli.log_phase \
      --project-dir docs/feature/{feature-id}/deliver \
      --step-id {step-id} \
      --phase {PHASE_NAME} \
      --status SKIPPED \
      --data "NOT_APPLICABLE: reason"

CLI enforces real UTC timestamps and validates phase names.
Do NOT manually edit execution-log.json.
Use the DES CLI to record phase outcomes and create log files.
Python resolution: `python3` — works on macOS (python3 only), Linux, and Windows.

CRITICAL: Only the executing agent calls the CLI.
Orchestrator MUST NEVER write phase entries — only the agent that performed the work. A log entry without actual execution is a **violation that DES detects and that will cause integrity verification to fail**, blocking finalize.

# RECORDING_INTEGRITY
Valid Skip Prefixes: NOT_APPLICABLE, BLOCKED_BY_DEPENDENCY, APPROVED_SKIP, CHECKPOINT_PENDING
Anti-Fraud Rules:
- NEVER write EXECUTED for phases you did not actually perform
- NEVER invent timestamps — DES CLI generates real UTC timestamps
- DES audits all entries; integrity violations block finalize

# BOUNDARY_RULES
- Only modify files listed in step's files_to_modify
- Do not load roadmap.json
- Do not modify execution-log.json structure (append only)
- NEVER write execution-log entries for phases you did not execute

# TIMEOUT_INSTRUCTION
Target: 30 turns max. If approaching limit, COMMIT current progress.
If GREEN complete (all tests pass), MUST commit before returning — even at turn limit.
```

**Configuration:**
- subagent_type: extracted agent name
- Turn limits are defined in each agent's `maxTurns` frontmatter field (not as a tool parameter)

## Error Handling

- Invalid agent: report available agents
- Missing roadmap/execution-log: report path not found
- Step not in roadmap: report available step IDs
- Dependency failure: explain blocking tasks

## Resume vs Restart

When subagent times out:

| Last Completed Phase | Action | Rationale |
|---------------------|--------|-----------|
| GREEN (or later) | Resume | Only COMMIT remains (~5 turns) |
| RED_UNIT with partial GREEN | Resume | Preserves implementation progress |
| PREPARE or RED_ACCEPTANCE | Restart | Little context worth replaying |

Resume costs ~50% more tokens/call due to context replay (measured: 3.7K vs 2.5K tokens/call). For <5 remaining turns, resume is efficient. For 15+ turns, restart is cheaper.

## Examples

```bash
/nw-execute @nw-software-crafter "des-us007-boundary-rules" "02-01"
/nw-execute @nw-researcher "auth-upgrade" "01-01"
/nw-execute @nw-software-crafter "des-us007" "03-01"  # retry after failure
```

## TDD_PHASES
<!-- Schema v4.0 — canonical source: TDDPhaseValidator.MANDATORY_PHASES -->
<!-- Build system injects mandatory phases from step-tdd-cycle-schema.json -->
{{MANDATORY_PHASES}}

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Agent invoked via Agent tool (dispatcher does not execute the work)
- [ ] Step context extracted from roadmap and passed in prompt
- [ ] Agent appended phase events to execution-log.json
- [ ] Agent did not load roadmap.json

## Next Wave

**Handoff To**: /nw-review for post-execution review
**Deliverables**: Updated execution-log.json|implementation artifacts|git commits

input.prompt:
Create a roadmap.json for the Skills feature (feature-id: "skills", GitHub issue #177).

Before you create the roadmap, read your skill file: `~/.claude/skills/nw-roadmap/SKILL.md`

Then read the following context files:
- `docs/feature/skills/design/architecture.md` — architecture and component boundaries
- `docs/feature/skills/design/wave-decisions.md` — design decisions
- `docs/feature/skills/distill/acceptance-scenarios.md` — acceptance test scenarios and implementation sequence
- `docs/feature/skills/distill/wave-decisions.md` — distill decisions
- `docs/feature/skills/discuss/story-map.md` — walking skeleton and release slices
- `docs/feature/skills/discuss/user-stories.md` — user stories with acceptance criteria
- `tests/acceptance/skill/skill-test-kit.ts` — existing test kit
- `tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts` — existing walking skeleton tests
- `tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts` — CRUD test file
- `tests/acceptance/skill/skill-lifecycle.test.ts` — lifecycle test file
- `tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts` — agent creation test file
- `tests/acceptance/skill/policy-governance.test.ts` — policy governance test file
- `app/src/server/agents/agent-queries.ts` — existing agent transaction (to extend)
- `app/src/server/agents/agent-route.ts` — existing agent routes (to extend)
- `app/src/server/agents/types.ts` — existing agent types
- `schema/surreal-schema.surql` — current schema (check for existing skill definitions)
- Also check existing migration files: `schema/migrations/` — find the highest numbered migration

Also read the existing codebase patterns:
- `app/src/server/learning/` — learning system pattern to follow (if this directory exists, read the route and queries files)
- `app/src/server/policy/` — policy system pattern (for governs_skill)

## Roadmap Structure

The roadmap must follow this exact structure. Step IDs must be in NN-NN format (e.g., 01-01, 01-02, 02-01).

Each step must map to ONE acceptance test scenario from the DISTILL wave. The `test_file` and `scenario_name` fields are MANDATORY.

## Implementation Phases

Based on the story map and acceptance scenarios, organize into these phases:

### Phase 01: Schema + Skill CRUD (Backend Foundation)
- 01-01: Schema migration (skill table + all relation tables)
- 01-02: Skill types definition
- 01-03: Skill queries (create, list, detail, update, delete, name check)
- 01-04: Skill route handlers + registration
- This phase should make WS-1 (walking skeleton) pass

### Phase 02: Skill Lifecycle
- 02-01: Activate endpoint (draft → active)
- 02-02: Deprecate endpoint (active → deprecated)
- 02-03: Lifecycle validation (reject invalid transitions)

### Phase 03: Agent Creation Extension
- 03-01: Extend agent types with skill_ids and additional_tool_ids
- 03-02: Extend createAgentTransaction with possesses + can_use edges
- 03-03: Extend agent detail to return assigned skills
- 03-04: Skill status validation in agent creation (reject deprecated skills)

### Phase 04: Effective Toolset Resolution
- 04-01: Skill-derived tools resolved from skill_requires edges
- 04-02: Effective toolset union (skill-derived + can_use)

### Phase 05: Policy Governance
- 05-01: governs_skill relation + skill detail shows governance

### Phase 06: Skill Library UI (Frontend)
- 06-01: Skill Library page (list + filter)
- 06-02: Skill Detail page
- 06-03: Create Skill form

### Phase 07: Agent Creation Wizard UI (Frontend)
- 07-01: Step 1 — consolidated config (runtime radio + form)
- 07-02: Step 2 — skills checklist
- 07-03: Step 3 — tools review (skill-derived + additional)
- 07-04: Wizard navigation + state preservation

## Key Constraints

- Functional paradigm (TypeScript, no classes)
- Follow learning system pattern for route handler factory + query DI
- SurrealDB conventions from docs/agents/surrealdb.md
- Non-UNIQUE index on workspace+name (SurrealDB v3.0.4 bug)
- Application-layer name uniqueness enforcement
- No null values — use optional fields
- Always use `--no-verify` and `-s` for git commits

## Test File Mapping

Map each step to the appropriate test file and scenario from the DISTILL wave:

- WS-1 → `tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts` → "admin registers a security audit skill..."
- WS-2 → `tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts` → "agent created with skills gains access..."
- WS-3 → `tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts` → "deprecated skill is excluded..."
- C-1 through C-11 → `tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts`
- L-1 through L-5 → `tests/acceptance/skill/skill-lifecycle.test.ts`
- A-1 through A-6, T-1 through T-3 → `tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts`
- G-1 through G-3 → `tests/acceptance/skill/policy-governance.test.ts`

## Output

Write the roadmap to: `docs/feature/skills/deliver/roadmap.json`

The roadmap.json should have this structure:
```json
{
  "feature_id": "skills",
  "title": "Skills: graph-native behavioral expertise layer",
  "description": "...",
  "validation": { "status": "pending_review" },
  "phases": [
    {
      "phase_id": "01",
      "name": "Schema + Skill CRUD",
      "steps": [
        {
          "step_id": "01-01",
          "name": "Schema migration",
          "description": "...",
          "acceptance_criteria": ["..."],
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/...",
          "scenario_name": "...",
          "files_to_modify": ["..."],
          "dependencies": [],
          "estimated_hours": 1,
          "deliverables": ["..."],
          "quality_gates": ["..."],
          "implementation_notes": "..."
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

IMPORTANT: Keep steps focused — each step should be completable in 1-2 hours. Combine related changes but don't make steps too large. Frontend steps can be larger since they're UI-only with no acceptance tests.

- Follow learning system pattern for route handler factory + query DI
- Non-UNIQUE index on workspace+name (SurrealDB v3.0.4 bug)
- Application-layer name uniqueness enforcement
- No null values — use optional fields
- Always use `--no-verify` and `-s` for git commits

## Test File Mapping

Map each step to the appropriate test file and scenario from the DISTILL wave. Read the test files to get exact scenario names.

## Output

Write the roadmap to: `docs/feature/skills/deliver/roadmap.json`

Keep steps focused — each step should be completable in 1-2 hours. Frontend steps can be larger since they're UI-only.

content.text:
The roadmap has been written to `/Users/marcus/conductor/workspaces/brain-v1/los-angeles/docs/feature/skills/deliver/roadmap.json`.

Here is a summary of the structure:

**6 phases, 17 steps total:**

| Phase | Name | Steps | Key Deliverables |
|-------|------|-------|-----------------|
| 01 | Schema + Skill CRUD | 01-01 through 01-06 | Migration 0084, types, queries, routes, registration. WS-1 passes. |
| 02 | Skill CRUD Completeness | 02-01 through 02-04 | Detail, update, delete endpoints. All C-* and L-* tests enabled. |
| 03 | Agent Creation Extension | 03-01 through 03-04 | Extended types, transaction with possesses/can_use, agent detail with skills. A-*, T-*, WS-2 pass. |
| 04 | Policy Governance + WS-3 | 04-01 | governs_skill in detail view. G-* and WS-3 pass. |
| 05 | Skill Library UI | 05-01 through 05-04 | Hooks, list page, detail page, create form. |
| 06 | Agent Creation Wizard UI | 06-01 through 06-02 | 3-step wizard: Config, Skills checklist, Tools review. |

**Test coverage mapping:**
- Every backend step maps to a specific acceptance scenario (WS-1/2/3, C-1 through C-11, L-1 through L-5, A-1 through A-6, T-1 through T-3, G-1 through G-3)
- Phase 04-01 enables all remaining walking skeletons and governance tests
- Frontend phases (05, 06) reference the backend scenarios they consume but are UI-only implementations

**Key design constraints respected:**
- Functional paradigm (no classes)
- Learning system pattern for route handler factory + query DI
- Non-UNIQUE index on workspace+name (SurrealDB v3.0.4 bug)
- Application-layer name uniqueness enforcement
- Migration numbered 0084 (next after highest existing 0083)
Roadmap created. Let me verify and run the quality gate.

   400→            "Deprecate button shown for active skills"
   401→          ],
   402→          "time_estimate": "1.5h",
   403→          "dependencies": ["05-01"],
   404→          "implementation_scope": [
   405→            "app/src/client/routes/skill-detail-page.tsx"
   406→          ]
   407→        },
   408→        {
   409→          "id": "05-04",
   410→          "name": "Create Skill form page",
   411→          "description": "Create SkillCreatePage with form: name, description, version, source type radio (GitHub/Git), repository/URL, ref, subpath, required tools checklist. Inline validation.",
   412→          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
   413→          "scenario_name": "C-1",
   414→          "acceptance_criteria": [
   415→            "Route: /workspaces/:id/skills/new",

   417→            "Required tools checklist from workspace mcp_tool catalog",
   418→            "Inline validation for required fields (name, description, version, source)",

   423→          "dependencies": ["05-01"],
   424→          "implementation_scope": [

   426→          ]
   427→        }
   428→      ]
   429→    },
   430→    {
   431→      "id": "06",
   432→      "name": "Agent Creation Wizard UI",
   433→      "description": "Frontend: 3-step wizard replacing current 2-step flow. Config > Skills > Tools > Create.",
   434→      "steps": [
   435→        {
   436→          "id": "06-01",
   437→          "name": "Wizard Step 1: Config (consolidate runtime + form)",
   438→          "description": "Rewrite AgentCreatePage as 3-step wizard with useState state management. Step 1 consolidates runtime radio + agent form fields (name, description, model, scopes, sandbox config).",
   439→          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",
   440→          "scenario_name": "WS-2",
   441→          "acceptance_criteria": [
   442→            "Runtime is a radio group (Sandbox/External), not separate step",
   443→            "Sandbox config fields shown conditionally",

   445→            "Next button enabled only when required fields valid",

   447→          ],
   448→          "time_estimate": "2h",
   449→          "dependencies": ["05-01"],
   450→          "implementation_scope": [
   451→            "app/src/client/routes/agent-create-page.tsx",
   452→            "app/src/client/components/agent/wizard-step-config.tsx"

   458→          "description": "Step 2 shows active workspace skills as checklist with count badge. Step 3 shows skill-derived tools (read-only) and additional tools (editable). Create Agent button on Step 3 submits with skill_ids and additional_tool_ids.",
   459→          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",

{
  "feature_id": "skills",
  "goal": "Implement Skills feature: graph-native behavioral expertise layer for sandbox agents (#177)",
  "github_issue": 177,
  "paradigm": "functional",
  "phases": [
    {
      "id": "01",
      "name": "Schema + Skill CRUD",
      "description": "Database migration, TypeScript types, query functions, route handlers, and route registration. Makes WS-1 pass.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "01-01",
          "name": "Schema migration 0084: skill table and relation tables",
          "description": "Create migration 0084_skill_table.surql with skill table (SCHEMAFULL), skill_requires, possesses, skill_supersedes, skill_evidence, governs_skill relation tables. Non-UNIQUE index on workspace+name. Apply via bun migrate.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "WS-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Migration 0084 creates skill table with all fields (name, description, version, status, workspace, source, source.type, source.source, source.ref, source.subpath, source.skills, created_by, created_at, updated_at)",
            "Migration creates skill_requires, possesses, skill_supersedes, skill_evidence, governs_skill relation tables",
            "Non-UNIQUE index idx_skill_workspace_name on skill FIELDS workspace, name",
            "possesses has granted_at field, skill_evidence has added_at field, governs_skill has created_at field",
            "bun migrate applies without error"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "30m",
          "dependencies": [],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "schema/migrations/0084_skill_table.surql"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "01-02",
          "name": "Skill domain types",
          "description": "Create app/src/server/skill/types.ts with SkillStatus, SkillSourceType, SkillSource, SkillRecord, CreateSkillInput, SkillListItem, SkillDetail types. Follow learning/types.ts pattern.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "WS-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "SkillStatus = 'draft' | 'active' | 'deprecated'",
            "SkillSourceType = 'github' | 'git'",
            "SkillSource has type, source, optional ref/subpath/skills",
            "CreateSkillInput has name, description, version, source, optional required_tool_ids",
            "SkillListItem has id, name, description, version, status, source, required_tools, agent_count, created_at",
            "SkillDetailResponse has skill, required_tools, agents, governed_by",
            "No null types -- use optional fields only"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "20m",
          "dependencies": [],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/types.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "01-03",
          "name": "Skill query functions: create and list",
          "description": "Create app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts with createSkill (INSERT + skill_requires edges, app-layer name uniqueness check) and listSkills (with optional status filter). Follow learning/queries.ts pattern with surreal as first parameter.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "createSkill takes surreal, workspaceId, input, identityId, now as parameters",
            "Pre-validates name uniqueness via SELECT query before CREATE",
            "Creates skill record with status 'draft' and workspace reference",
            "Creates skill_requires edges for each required_tool_id via RELATE",
            "Returns created skill with id and status",
            "listSkills returns skills filtered by workspace and optional status",
            "Each list item includes required_tools and agent_count via graph traversal"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["01-01", "01-02"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "01-04",
          "name": "Skill route handlers: create and list",
          "description": "Create app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts with createSkillRouteHandlers factory. Implement handleCreate (POST) and handleList (GET with ?status filter). Follow learning-route.ts handler factory pattern.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-2",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "createSkillRouteHandlers(deps) returns handler functions",
            "handleCreate validates required fields (name, description, version, source), returns 400 for missing fields",
            "handleCreate returns 409 for duplicate name",
            "handleCreate returns 201 with { skill: { id, name, status } }",
            "handleList accepts ?status query param, returns { skills: SkillListItem[] }",
            "Both handlers resolve identity from Better Auth session",
            "Wide-event span attributes: skill.create.skill_id, skill.list.count"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["01-03"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "01-05",
          "name": "Skill lifecycle query functions: activate and deprecate",
          "description": "Add activateSkill and deprecateSkill to skill-queries.ts. Activate: draft -> active. Deprecate: active -> deprecated. Both return 409 for invalid transitions.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-lifecycle.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "L-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "activateSkill validates current status is 'draft', throws HttpError(409) otherwise",
            "activateSkill updates status to 'active' and sets updated_at",
            "deprecateSkill validates current status is 'active', throws HttpError(409) otherwise",
            "deprecateSkill updates status to 'deprecated' and sets updated_at",
            "Both throw HttpError(404) if skill not found in workspace"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["01-03"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "01-06",
          "name": "Skill lifecycle route handlers and route registration",
          "description": "Add handleActivate and handleDeprecate to skill-route.ts. Register all skill routes in start-server.ts. Enable WS-1 test.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "WS-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "POST /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/activate returns 200 on success, 409 on invalid transition",
            "POST /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/deprecate returns 200 on success, 409 on invalid transition",
            "All skill routes registered in start-server.ts following existing pattern",
            "WS-1 walking skeleton test passes: create -> activate -> list active"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["01-04", "01-05"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts",
            "app/src/server/runtime/start-server.ts"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "02",
      "name": "Skill CRUD Completeness",
      "description": "Detail, update, delete endpoints plus all CRUD error/edge scenarios.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "02-01",
          "name": "Skill detail query and route handler",
          "description": "Add getSkillDetail to skill-queries.ts: returns skill with required_tools (via skill_requires), agents (via possesses), governed_by (via governs_skill). Add handleGetDetail route handler.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-4",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "getSkillDetail returns skill metadata + required_tools array + agents array + governed_by array",
            "required_tools resolved via: SELECT out.id, out.name FROM skill_requires WHERE in = $skill",
            "agents resolved via: SELECT in.name FROM possesses WHERE out = $skill",
            "governed_by resolved via: SELECT in.id, in.name, in.status FROM governs_skill WHERE out = $skill",
            "GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId returns 200 with SkillDetailResponse",
            "Returns 404 for nonexistent skill"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["01-06"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts",
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "02-02",
          "name": "Skill update query and route handler",
          "description": "Add updateSkill to skill-queries.ts and handleUpdate route handler. Supports updating name, description, version, source, required_tool_ids. Sets updated_at.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-5",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "updateSkill updates provided fields and sets updated_at",
            "If name changes, validates new name uniqueness within workspace",
            "If required_tool_ids provided, replaces skill_requires edges (delete old, create new)",
            "PUT /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId returns 200 with updated skill",
            "Returns 404 for nonexistent skill"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["01-06"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts",
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "02-03",
          "name": "Skill delete query and route handler",
          "description": "Add deleteSkill to skill-queries.ts: validates 0 possesses edges, removes skill + skill_requires edges. Add handleDelete route handler.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-6",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "deleteSkill checks possesses edge count, throws HttpError(409) if > 0",
            "Deletes skill record and all skill_requires edges in transaction",
            "DELETE /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId returns 200 on success",
            "Returns 409 when agents possess the skill (C-9)",
            "Returns 404 for nonexistent skill"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["01-06"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts",
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "02-04",
          "name": "Enable remaining CRUD and lifecycle test scenarios",
          "description": "Enable all skipped tests: C-1 through C-11, L-1 through L-5. Fix any issues found during test execution.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-3, C-7, C-8, C-9, C-10, C-11",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "C-1: create with source + tools passes",
            "C-2: list all skills passes",
            "C-3: list filtered by status passes",
            "C-4: detail with tools passes",
            "C-5: update metadata passes",
            "C-6: delete unassigned skill passes",
            "C-7: duplicate name returns 409",
            "C-8: missing fields returns 400",
            "C-9: delete assigned skill returns 409",
            "C-10: nonexistent skill returns 404",
            "C-11: skill with no tools has 0 skill_requires edges",
            "L-1 through L-5 lifecycle tests pass"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["02-01", "02-02", "02-03"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
            "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-lifecycle.test.ts"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "03",
      "name": "Agent Creation Extension",
      "description": "Extend agent creation transaction with possesses and can_use edges, extend agent detail with skills, add skill status validation.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "03-01",
          "name": "Extend CreateAgentInput types with skill_ids and additional_tool_ids",
          "description": "Add skill_ids and additional_tool_ids optional fields to CreateAgentInput in agents/types.ts. Add skills array to AgentDetail type.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "A-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "CreateAgentInput has optional skill_ids: string[]",
            "CreateAgentInput has optional additional_tool_ids: string[]",
            "AgentDetail has optional skills: Array<{ id: string; name: string }>",
            "Existing agent creation without skills continues to work"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "15m",
          "dependencies": ["01-06"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/agents/types.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "03-02",
          "name": "Extend createAgentTransaction with skill validation and possesses/can_use edges",
          "description": "Extend createAgentTransaction in agent-queries.ts: validate selected skills are active, add RELATE possesses and can_use edges to transaction SQL. Extend agent route to pass new fields.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "A-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Pre-transaction validation: query selected skills, reject if any not found or not active (HttpError 409)",
            "Transaction adds RELATE $identity->possesses->$skill SET granted_at = $now for each skill_id",
            "Transaction adds RELATE $identity->can_use->$tool for each additional_tool_id",
            "Agent creation with no skills/tools works unchanged (A-3)",
            "Agent route handler parses skill_ids and additional_tool_ids from request body"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1.5h",
          "dependencies": ["03-01"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/agents/agent-queries.ts",
            "app/src/server/agents/agent-route.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "03-03",
          "name": "Extend agent detail with assigned skills",
          "description": "Extend getAgentDetail in agent-queries.ts to include possessed skills. Add query for skills via possesses edges.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "A-6",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Agent detail query includes: SELECT out.id, out.name FROM possesses WHERE in = $identity",
            "AgentDetail response includes skills array with id and name",
            "Agent detail with no skills returns empty skills array"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["03-02"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/agents/agent-queries.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "03-04",
          "name": "Enable agent creation and toolset test scenarios",
          "description": "Enable all agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts scenarios: A-1 through A-6, T-1 through T-3. Enable WS-2 walking skeleton.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "A-2, A-3, A-4, A-5, T-1, T-2, T-3",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "A-1: agent with 2 skills has 2 possesses edges",
            "A-2: agent with additional tools has can_use edges",
            "A-3: agent without skills/tools has 0 possesses and 0 can_use edges",
            "A-4: deprecated skill blocks creation (409)",
            "A-5: nonexistent skill blocks creation",
            "A-6: agent detail includes assigned skills",
            "T-1: skill-derived tools resolved from skill_requires edges",
            "T-2: shared tools deduplicated in effective toolset",
            "T-3: effective toolset is union of skill-derived and can_use",
            "WS-2: walking skeleton passes"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["03-03"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts",
            "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "04",
      "name": "Policy Governance + WS-3",
      "description": "governs_skill relation support in skill detail and remaining walking skeleton.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "04-01",
          "name": "Policy governance in skill detail and WS-3",
          "description": "Skill detail already includes governed_by query from 02-01. Enable G-1, G-2, G-3 tests and WS-3 walking skeleton. Verify governs_skill edges are correctly traversed.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/policy-governance.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "G-1, G-2, G-3",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "G-1: governs_skill relation persisted via direct DB",
            "G-2: skill detail includes governing policy name and status",
            "G-3: skill without governing policy shows empty governed_by",
            "WS-3: lifecycle governs visibility -- deprecated skill excluded from active listing"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["02-04", "03-04"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "tests/acceptance/skill/policy-governance.test.ts",
            "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "05",
      "name": "Skill Library UI",
      "description": "Frontend: skill list page, detail page, create form. React components with TanStack Router.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "05-01",
          "name": "Skill hooks and API client",
          "description": "Create useSkills, useSkillDetail, useCreateSkill, useActivateSkill, useDeprecateSkill hooks in app/src/client/hooks/use-skills.ts. Follow existing hook patterns (e.g., useLearnings).",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-2",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "useSkills fetches GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills with optional status filter",
            "useSkillDetail fetches GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId",
            "useCreateSkill POSTs to /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills",
            "useActivateSkill POSTs to /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/activate",
            "useDeprecateSkill POSTs to /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/deprecate",
            "Hooks handle loading, error, and success states"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["02-04"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/client/hooks/use-skills.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "05-02",
          "name": "Skill Library list page",
          "description": "Create SkillLibraryPage with card-based list, status filter tabs, empty state. Register route in TanStack Router. Add navigation link.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-2",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Route: /workspaces/:id/skills",
            "Cards show name, version, status badge, description excerpt, source type, agent count",
            "Status filter tabs: All, Active, Draft, Deprecated",
            "Empty state with guidance text and Create Skill button",
            "Navigation link added to sidebar/nav"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1.5h",
          "dependencies": ["05-01"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/client/routes/skill-library-page.tsx",
            "app/src/client/components/skill/skill-card.tsx"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "05-03",
          "name": "Skill detail page",
          "description": "Create SkillDetailPage showing full metadata, required tools, assigned agents, governance info, and lifecycle action buttons (Activate/Deprecate).",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-4",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Route: /workspaces/:id/skills/:skillId",
            "Shows skill name, description, version, status, source info",
            "Required tools section lists tool names",
            "Agents section lists agent names with links",
            "Governed By section lists policy names with links",
            "Activate button shown for draft skills",
            "Deprecate button shown for active skills"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1.5h",
          "dependencies": ["05-01"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/client/routes/skill-detail-page.tsx"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "05-04",
          "name": "Create Skill form page",
          "description": "Create SkillCreatePage with form: name, description, version, source type radio (GitHub/Git), repository/URL, ref, subpath, required tools checklist. Inline validation.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Route: /workspaces/:id/skills/new",
            "Source type radio toggles field labels (Repository vs URL)",
            "Required tools checklist from workspace mcp_tool catalog",
            "Inline validation for required fields (name, description, version, source)",
            "Submit creates skill and redirects to Skill Library",
            "Created skill defaults to draft status"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1.5h",
          "dependencies": ["05-01"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/client/routes/skill-create-page.tsx"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "06",
      "name": "Agent Creation Wizard UI",
      "description": "Frontend: 3-step wizard replacing current 2-step flow. Config > Skills > Tools > Create.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "06-01",
          "name": "Wizard Step 1: Config (consolidate runtime + form)",
          "description": "Rewrite AgentCreatePage as 3-step wizard with useState state management. Step 1 consolidates runtime radio + agent form fields (name, description, model, scopes, sandbox config).",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "WS-2",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Runtime is a radio group (Sandbox/External), not separate step",
            "Sandbox config fields shown conditionally",
            "Name uniqueness validated via existing check-name API",
            "Next button enabled only when required fields valid",
            "Wizard state preserved across steps (useState at page level)"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "2h",
          "dependencies": ["05-01"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/client/routes/agent-create-page.tsx",
            "app/src/client/components/agent/wizard-step-config.tsx"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "06-02",
          "name": "Wizard Step 2: Skills checklist + Step 3: Tools review",
          "description": "Step 2 shows active workspace skills as checklist with count badge. Step 3 shows skill-derived tools (read-only) and additional tools (editable). Create Agent button on Step 3 submits with skill_ids and additional_tool_ids.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "WS-2",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Step 2 fetches active skills and shows checklist with name, version, description",
            "Count badge updates on check/uncheck",
            "Skip button advances with 0 skills",
            "Empty state when no active skills",
            "Step 3 shows skill-derived tools with 'via skill X' labels (client-side resolution)",
            "Shared tools listed once with all source skill names",
            "Additional tools checklist excludes skill-derived tools",
            "Total effective tools summary shown",
            "Create Agent submits with skill_ids and additional_tool_ids",
            "Back navigation preserves selections"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "2.5h",
          "dependencies": ["06-01"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/client/components/agent/wizard-step-skills.tsx",
            "app/src/client/components/agent/wizard-step-tools.tsx"
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

{
  "feature_id": "skills",
  "goal": "Implement Skills feature: graph-native behavioral expertise layer for sandbox agents (#177)",
  "github_issue": 177,
  "paradigm": "functional",
  "phases": [
    {
      "id": "01",
      "name": "Schema + Skill CRUD",
      "description": "Database migration, TypeScript types, query functions, route handlers, and route registration. Makes WS-1 pass.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "01-01",
          "name": "Schema migration 0084: skill table and relation tables",
          "description": "Create migration 0084_skill_table.surql with skill table (SCHEMAFULL), skill_requires, possesses, skill_supersedes, skill_evidence, governs_skill relation tables. Non-UNIQUE index on workspace+name. Apply via bun migrate.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "WS-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Migration 0084 creates skill table with all fields (name, description, version, status, workspace, source, source.type, source.source, source.ref, source.subpath, source.skills, created_by, created_at, updated_at)",
            "Migration creates skill_requires, possesses, skill_supersedes, skill_evidence, governs_skill relation tables",
            "Non-UNIQUE index idx_skill_workspace_name on skill FIELDS workspace, name",
            "possesses has granted_at field, skill_evidence has added_at field, governs_skill has created_at field",
            "bun migrate applies without error"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "30m",
          "dependencies": [],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "schema/migrations/0084_skill_table.surql"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "01-02",
          "name": "Skill domain types",
          "description": "Create app/src/server/skill/types.ts with SkillStatus, SkillSourceType, SkillSource, SkillRecord, CreateSkillInput, SkillListItem, SkillDetail types. Follow learning/types.ts pattern.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "WS-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "SkillStatus = 'draft' | 'active' | 'deprecated'",
            "SkillSourceType = 'github' | 'git'",
            "SkillSource has type, source, optional ref/subpath/skills",
            "CreateSkillInput has name, description, version, source, optional required_tool_ids",
            "SkillListItem has id, name, description, version, status, source, required_tools, agent_count, created_at",
            "SkillDetailResponse has skill, required_tools, agents, governed_by",
            "No null types -- use optional fields only"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "20m",
          "dependencies": [],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/types.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "01-03",
          "name": "Skill query functions: create and list",
          "description": "Create app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts with createSkill (INSERT + skill_requires edges, app-layer name uniqueness check) and listSkills (with optional status filter). Follow learning/queries.ts pattern with surreal as first parameter.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "createSkill takes surreal, workspaceId, input, identityId, now as parameters",
            "Pre-validates name uniqueness via SELECT query before CREATE",
            "Creates skill record with status 'draft' and workspace reference",
            "Creates skill_requires edges for each required_tool_id via RELATE",
            "Returns created skill with id and status",
            "listSkills returns skills filtered by workspace and optional status",
            "Each list item includes required_tools and agent_count via graph traversal"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["01-01", "01-02"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "01-04",
          "name": "Skill route handlers: create and list",
          "description": "Create app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts with createSkillRouteHandlers factory. Implement handleCreate (POST) and handleList (GET with ?status filter). Follow learning-route.ts handler factory pattern.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-2",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "createSkillRouteHandlers(deps) returns handler functions",
            "handleCreate validates required fields (name, description, version, source), returns 400 for missing fields",
            "handleCreate returns 409 for duplicate name",
            "handleCreate returns 201 with { skill: { id, name, status } }",
            "handleList accepts ?status query param, returns { skills: SkillListItem[] }",
            "Both handlers resolve identity from Better Auth session",
            "Wide-event span attributes: skill.create.skill_id, skill.list.count"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["01-03"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "01-05",
          "name": "Skill lifecycle query functions: activate and deprecate",
          "description": "Add activateSkill and deprecateSkill to skill-queries.ts. Activate: draft -> active. Deprecate: active -> deprecated. Both return 409 for invalid transitions.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-lifecycle.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "L-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "activateSkill validates current status is 'draft', throws HttpError(409) otherwise",
            "activateSkill updates status to 'active' and sets updated_at",
            "deprecateSkill validates current status is 'active', throws HttpError(409) otherwise",
            "deprecateSkill updates status to 'deprecated' and sets updated_at",
            "Both throw HttpError(404) if skill not found in workspace"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["01-03"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "01-06",
          "name": "Skill lifecycle route handlers and route registration",
          "description": "Add handleActivate and handleDeprecate to skill-route.ts. Register all skill routes in start-server.ts. Enable WS-1 test.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "WS-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "POST /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/activate returns 200 on success, 409 on invalid transition",
            "POST /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/deprecate returns 200 on success, 409 on invalid transition",
            "All skill routes registered in start-server.ts following existing pattern",
            "WS-1 walking skeleton test passes: create -> activate -> list active"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["01-04", "01-05"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts",
            "app/src/server/runtime/start-server.ts"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "02",
      "name": "Skill CRUD Completeness",
      "description": "Detail, update, delete endpoints plus all CRUD error/edge scenarios.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "02-01",
          "name": "Skill detail query and route handler",
          "description": "Add getSkillDetail to skill-queries.ts: returns skill with required_tools (via skill_requires), agents (via possesses), governed_by (via governs_skill). Add handleGetDetail route handler.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-4",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "getSkillDetail returns skill metadata + required_tools array + agents array + governed_by array",
            "required_tools resolved via: SELECT out.id, out.name FROM skill_requires WHERE in = $skill",
            "agents resolved via: SELECT in.name FROM possesses WHERE out = $skill",
            "governed_by resolved via: SELECT in.id, in.name, in.status FROM governs_skill WHERE out = $skill",
            "GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId returns 200 with SkillDetailResponse",
            "Returns 404 for nonexistent skill"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["01-06"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts",
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "02-02",
          "name": "Skill update query and route handler",
          "description": "Add updateSkill to skill-queries.ts and handleUpdate route handler. Supports updating name, description, version, source, required_tool_ids. Sets updated_at.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-5",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "updateSkill updates provided fields and sets updated_at",
            "If name changes, validates new name uniqueness within workspace",
            "If required_tool_ids provided, replaces skill_requires edges (delete old, create new)",
            "PUT /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId returns 200 with updated skill",
            "Returns 404 for nonexistent skill"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["01-06"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts",
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "02-03",
          "name": "Skill delete query and route handler",
          "description": "Add deleteSkill to skill-queries.ts: validates 0 possesses edges, removes skill + skill_requires edges. Add handleDelete route handler.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-6",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "deleteSkill checks possesses edge count, throws HttpError(409) if > 0",
            "Deletes skill record and all skill_requires edges in transaction",
            "DELETE /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId returns 200 on success",
            "Returns 409 when agents possess the skill (C-9)",
            "Returns 404 for nonexistent skill"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["01-06"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-queries.ts",
            "app/src/server/skill/skill-route.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "02-04",
          "name": "Enable remaining CRUD and lifecycle test scenarios",
          "description": "Enable all skipped tests: C-1 through C-11, L-1 through L-5. Fix any issues found during test execution.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-3, C-7, C-8, C-9, C-10, C-11",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "C-1: create with source + tools passes",
            "C-2: list all skills passes",
            "C-3: list filtered by status passes",
            "C-4: detail with tools passes",
            "C-5: update metadata passes",
            "C-6: delete unassigned skill passes",
            "C-7: duplicate name returns 409",
            "C-8: missing fields returns 400",
            "C-9: delete assigned skill returns 409",
            "C-10: nonexistent skill returns 404",
            "C-11: skill with no tools has 0 skill_requires edges",
            "L-1 through L-5 lifecycle tests pass"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["02-01", "02-02", "02-03"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
            "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-lifecycle.test.ts"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "03",
      "name": "Agent Creation Extension",
      "description": "Extend agent creation transaction with possesses and can_use edges, extend agent detail with skills, add skill status validation.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "03-01",
          "name": "Extend CreateAgentInput types with skill_ids and additional_tool_ids",
          "description": "Add skill_ids and additional_tool_ids optional fields to CreateAgentInput in agents/types.ts. Add skills array to AgentDetail type.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "A-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "CreateAgentInput has optional skill_ids: string[]",
            "CreateAgentInput has optional additional_tool_ids: string[]",
            "AgentDetail has optional skills: Array<{ id: string; name: string }>",
            "Existing agent creation without skills continues to work"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "15m",
          "dependencies": ["01-06"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/agents/types.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "03-02",
          "name": "Extend createAgentTransaction with skill validation and possesses/can_use edges",
          "description": "Extend createAgentTransaction in agent-queries.ts: validate selected skills are active, add RELATE possesses and can_use edges to transaction SQL. Extend agent route to pass new fields.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "A-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Pre-transaction validation: query selected skills, reject if any not found or not active (HttpError 409)",
            "Transaction adds RELATE $identity->possesses->$skill SET granted_at = $now for each skill_id",
            "Transaction adds RELATE $identity->can_use->$tool for each additional_tool_id",
            "Agent creation with no skills/tools works unchanged (A-3)",
            "Agent route handler parses skill_ids and additional_tool_ids from request body"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1.5h",
          "dependencies": ["03-01"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/agents/agent-queries.ts",
            "app/src/server/agents/agent-route.ts"

        },
        {
          "id": "03-03",
          "name": "Extend agent detail with assigned skills",
          "description": "Extend getAgentDetail in agent-queries.ts to include possessed skills. Add query for skills via possesses edges.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "A-6",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Agent detail query includes: SELECT out.id, out.name FROM possesses WHERE in = $identity",
            "AgentDetail response includes skills array with id and name",

          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["03-02"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/server/agents/agent-queries.ts"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "03-04",
          "name": "Enable agent creation and toolset test scenarios",
          "description": "Enable all agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts scenarios: A-1 through A-6, T-1 through T-3. Enable WS-2 walking skeleton.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "A-2, A-3, A-4, A-5, T-1, T-2, T-3",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "A-1: agent with 2 skills has 2 possesses edges",
            "A-2: agent with additional tools has can_use edges",
            "A-3: agent without skills/tools has 0 possesses and 0 can_use edges",
            "A-4: deprecated skill blocks creation (409)",
            "A-5: nonexistent skill blocks creation",
            "A-6: agent detail includes assigned skills",
            "T-1: skill-derived tools resolved from skill_requires edges",
            "T-2: shared tools deduplicated in effective toolset",
            "T-3: effective toolset is union of skill-derived and can_use",
            "WS-2: walking skeleton passes"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["03-03"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "tests/acceptance/skill/agent-creation-with-skills.test.ts",
            "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "04",
      "name": "Policy Governance + WS-3",
      "description": "governs_skill relation support in skill detail and remaining walking skeleton.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "04-01",
          "name": "Policy governance in skill detail and WS-3",
          "description": "Skill detail already includes governed_by query from 02-01. Enable G-1, G-2, G-3 tests and WS-3 walking skeleton. Verify governs_skill edges are correctly traversed.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/policy-governance.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "G-1, G-2, G-3",
          "acceptance_criteria": [

          ],
          "time_estimate": "45m",
          "dependencies": ["02-04", "03-04"],
          "implementation_scope": [

      ]
    },

            "useDeprecateSkill POSTs to /api/workspaces/:wsId/skills/:skillId/deprecate",

          "time_estimate": "1h",
          "dependencies": ["02-04"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/client/hooks/use-skills.ts"

        },
        {

          "name": "Skill Library list page",
          "description": "Create SkillLibraryPage with card-based list, status filter tabs, empty state. Register route in TanStack Router. Add navigation link.",

        },

          "id": "05-03",
          "name": "Skill detail page",

          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-4",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Route: /workspaces/:id/skills/:skillId",

            "Required tools section lists tool names",

            "Governed By section lists policy names with links",
            "Activate button shown for draft skills",
            "Deprecate button shown for active skills"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1.5h",
          "dependencies": ["05-01"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/client/routes/skill-detail-page.tsx"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "05-04",
          "name": "Create Skill form page",
          "description": "Create SkillCreatePage with form: name, description, version, source type radio (GitHub/Git), repository/URL, ref, subpath, required tools checklist. Inline validation.",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/skill-crud.test.ts",
          "scenario_name": "C-1",
          "acceptance_criteria": [
            "Route: /workspaces/:id/skills/new",
            "Source type radio toggles field labels (Repository vs URL)",
            "Required tools checklist from workspace mcp_tool catalog",
            "Inline validation for required fields (name, description, version, source)",
            "Submit creates skill and redirects to Skill Library",
            "Created skill defaults to draft status"
          ],
          "time_estimate": "1.5h",
          "dependencies": ["05-01"],
          "implementation_scope": [
            "app/src/client/routes/skill-create-page.tsx"
          ]

      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "06",
      "name": "Agent Creation Wizard UI",
      "description": "Frontend: 3-step wizard replacing current 2-step flow. Config > Skills > Tools > Create.",
      "steps": [
        {
          "id": "06-01",
          "name": "Wizard Step 1: Config (consolidate runtime + form)",
          "description": "Rewrite AgentCreatePage as 3-step wizard with useState state management. Step 1 consolidates runtime radio + agent form fields (name, description, model, scopes, sandbox config).",
          "test_file": "tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts",

          "implementation_scope": [

Description: Create migration 0084_skill_table.surql with skill table (SCHEMAFULL), skill_requires, possesses, skill_supersedes, skill_evidence, governs_skill relation tables. Non-UNIQUE index on workspace+name. Apply via bun migrate.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Migration 0084 creates skill table with all fields (name, description, version, status, workspace, source, source.type, source.source, source.ref, source.subpath, source.skills, created_by, created_at, updated_at)
- Migration creates skill_requires, possesses, skill_supersedes, skill_evidence, governs_skill relation tables
- Non-UNIQUE index idx_skill_workspace_name on skill FIELDS workspace, name
- possesses has granted_at field, skill_evidence has added_at field, governs_skill has created_at field
- bun migrate applies without error

Test File: tests/acceptance/skill/walking-skeleton.test.ts
Scenario Name: WS-1 (This test won't pass yet — it needs routes too. This step just creates the schema.)

Files to Modify:
- schema/migrations/0084_skill_table.surql (NEW)

Quality Gates:
- Migration applies cleanly via bun migrate
- Schema matches the design spec exactly

Implementation Notes:
- Check schema/migrations/ for the highest existing migration number to confirm 0084 is correct
- Follow SurrealDB conventions from docs/agents/surrealdb.md:
  - Wrap in BEGIN TRANSACTION; ... COMMIT TRANSACTION;
  - Use DEFINE ... OVERWRITE for schema evolution
  - All tables SCHEMAFULL
  - For nested object fields (source.*), explicitly define each subfield
  - option<string> for optional fields, option<record<...>> for optional record refs
- ASSERT on status field: $value IN ["draft", "active", "deprecated"]
- ASSERT on source.type: $value IN ["github", "git"]
- Non-UNIQUE index due to SurrealDB v3.0.4 UNIQUE index bug (see docs/agents/surrealdb.md)
- skill_evidence OUT type is: agent_session | trace | observation

# DESIGN_CONTEXT
Architecture: Modular monolith, functional TypeScript (Bun backend + React frontend). SurrealDB graph database.
Component: New `skill/` module at `app/src/server/skill/` following learning system pattern.
Schema (from architecture.md Section 6.1):
```sql
DEFINE TABLE skill SCHEMAFULL;
DEFINE FIELD name ON skill TYPE string;
DEFINE FIELD description ON skill TYPE string;
DEFINE FIELD version ON skill TYPE string;
DEFINE FIELD status ON skill TYPE string ASSERT $value IN ["draft", "active", "deprecated"];
DEFINE FIELD workspace ON skill TYPE record<workspace>;
DEFINE FIELD source ON skill TYPE object;
DEFINE FIELD source.type ON skill TYPE string ASSERT $value IN ["github", "git"];
DEFINE FIELD source.source ON skill TYPE string;
DEFINE FIELD source.ref ON skill TYPE option<string>;
DEFINE FIELD source.subpath ON skill TYPE option<string>;
DEFINE FIELD source.skills ON skill TYPE option<array<string>>;
DEFINE FIELD created_by ON skill TYPE option<record<identity>>;
DEFINE FIELD created_at ON skill TYPE datetime;
DEFINE FIELD updated_at ON skill TYPE option<datetime>;
DEFINE INDEX idx_skill_workspace_name ON skill FIELDS workspace, name;

DEFINE TABLE skill_requires TYPE RELATION IN skill OUT mcp_tool SCHEMAFULL;
DEFINE TABLE possesses TYPE RELATION IN identity OUT skill SCHEMAFULL;
DEFINE FIELD granted_at ON possesses TYPE datetime;
DEFINE TABLE skill_supersedes TYPE RELATION IN skill OUT skill SCHEMAFULL;
DEFINE TABLE skill_evidence TYPE RELATION IN skill OUT agent_session | trace | observation SCHEMAFULL;
DEFINE FIELD added_at ON skill_evidence TYPE datetime;
DEFINE TABLE governs_skill TYPE RELATION IN policy OUT skill SCHEMAFULL;
```

Key constraints:
- Non-UNIQUE index (SurrealDB v3.0.4 bug workaround)
- No null — use option<> for optional fields
- governs_skill needs a created_at field

# TDD_PHASES
Execute in order:
0. PREPARE - Read the existing migrations to confirm numbering. Read the schema spec.
1. RED_ACCEPTANCE - The WS-1 test exists but needs the schema to pass. This step is schema-only, so the test will still fail (no routes yet). For this step, verify schema applies via `bun migrate` — that IS the acceptance criterion.
2. RED_UNIT - Not applicable for a schema migration. Skip with reason.
3. GREEN - Write the migration file and run `bun migrate` to verify it applies.
4. COMMIT - Stage and commit with conventional message.
   Include git trailer: `Step-ID: 01-01`
   Use `--no-verify` and `-s` flags for git commit.

# OUTCOME_RECORDING
After ACTUALLY EXECUTING each phase, record via DES CLI:

    PYTHONPATH=$HOME/.claude/lib/python python3 -m des.cli.log_phase \
      --project-dir docs/feature/skills/deliver \
      --step-id 01-01 \
      --phase {PHASE_NAME} \
      --status EXECUTED \
      --data PASS

For SKIPPED phases:

    PYTHONPATH=$HOME/.claude/lib/python python3 -m des.cli.log_phase \
      --project-dir docs/feature/skills/deliver \
      --step-id 01-01 \
      --phase {PHASE_NAME} \
      --status SKIPPED \
      --data "NOT_APPLICABLE: reason"

# RECORDING_INTEGRITY
Valid Skip Prefixes: NOT_APPLICABLE, BLOCKED_BY_DEPENDENCY, APPROVED_SKIP, CHECKPOINT_PENDING
Anti-Fraud Rules:
- NEVER write EXECUTED for phases you did not actually perform
- NEVER invent timestamps — DES CLI generates real UTC timestamps

# BOUNDARY_RULES
- Only modify files listed in step's files_to_modify
- Do not load roadmap.json
- Do not modify execution-log.json structure (append only)

# TIMEOUT_INSTRUCTION
Target: 30 turns max. If approaching limit, COMMIT current progress.

<!-- DES-VALIDATION : required -->
